phase: Phase 1.1 - API-Football bulk odds discovery and odds-first fixture selection
source_of_truth: Existing CSV/JSON and Telegram notification state
primary_goal: Prevent MAX_MATCHES analysis slots from being consumed by fixtures without available bookmaker odds.

validation.command: python -m compileall football_agent -q && python smoke_test.py && python -m unittest discover -s tests

important_note: Keep DATABASE_SHADOW_MODE=true and TELEGRAM_ENABLED=false during first live validation. V25.1.1 changes selection/order and odds telemetry only; it does not promote Supabase to source of truth.
